reviews.comment:
Vine a las 18.32 el lunes 2 de febrero estaba toda sucia atendieron gente primero que a mi aunque estaba primero me faltaron el respeto por exigir que me atiendan a mi porque yo estaba primero y encima después no quieren que haya autoservicio, manga de irrespetuosos todos los empleados de esta YPF los deberia denunciar a todos por como me trataron

(Translated by Google)
I arrived at 6:32 PM on Monday, February 2nd. The place was filthy. They served other people before me, even though I was first in line. They disrespected me for demanding service because I was there first, and then they refused to allow self-service. A bunch of disrespectful people! I should report all the employees at this YPF station for how they treated me.
